creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250873
qdrant crash

I'm seeing segfaults with qdrant 1.9.0 and also 1.9.2 (I updated the port locally & regenerated the crate dependencies)

At first I thought it was due to running it in a jail, but it also crashes for me outside the jail. I've also reported this upstream.

https://github.com/qdrant/qdrant/issues/4295


Attached is a capture of it crashing as seen by truss
